rulings.Case Title: BEATRICE KEAYS ET AL VS. 50 BEALE INC. ET AL

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 12, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Barsotti's Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/GLW)
